scripts.test:all: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:shared && pnpm run server:test
scripts.ci: pnpm run lint && pnpm run test:all && pnpm run build && pnpm run test
scripts.tauri:prod: pnpm run build && cd apps/tauri && WINIT_UNIX_BACKEND=wayland GDK_BACKEND=wayland WEBKIT_DISABLE_DMABUF_RENDERER=1 cargo tauri dev --config src-tauri/tauri.prod.conf.json
scripts.tauri:build: pnpm run build && cd apps/tauri && cargo tauri build
scripts.tauri:android:dev: cd apps/tauri && cargo tauri android dev
scripts.tauri:android:dev:offline: pnpm run build && cd apps/tauri && cargo tauri android build --debug --apk && cd src-tauri/gen/android && ./gradlew app:installUniversalDebug && adb shell monkey -p com.futo.notes -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1
scripts.tauri:android:build: cd apps/tauri && cargo tauri android build
scripts.tauri:ios:dev: cd apps/tauri && cargo tauri ios dev --config src-tauri/tauri.ios.dev.conf.json
scripts.tauri:ios:dev:offline: pnpm run build && cd apps/tauri && cargo tauri ios build --debug && xcrun devicectl device install app --device 00008150-001C70A634F0401C src-tauri/gen/apple/build/arm64/Stonefruit.ipa && xcrun devicectl device process launch --device 00008150-001C70A634F0401C com.futo.notes
scripts.tauri:ios:build: cd apps/tauri && cargo tauri ios build
